chapter_context.summary: The death of Miriam; Moses strikes the rock in anger instead of speaking to it; the death of Aaron.

outline.text: Water from the Rock at Meribah
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Water from the Rock at Meribah (20:1-13), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.
This section focuses on Edom Refuses Passage (20:14-21), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.
This section focuses on Death of Aaron (20:22-29), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.

key_themes.title: God's Faithfulness
key_themes.description: God sustaining His people despite their repeated rebellions.

key_themes.title: The Census
key_themes.description: The organization and numbering of the new generation.

devotional.question: How can we learn from Israel's mistakes and choose trust over complaining?
In what ways has God 'cloud and fire' guided your path recently?

cultural_historical.title: The Wilderness Journey
cultural_historical.text: The journey from Sinai to Moab was meant to be brief but became a 40-year period of purification for the nation.
